description_long: This airplane features a streamlined, elongated fuselage with a predominantly white central body and a green, patterned tail section. The wings are swept back and positioned low on the fuselage, with a distinctive green and black marbled texture. The nose is rounded and orange, with a metallic, pointed tip and two small, curved, beige elements resembling canards or forward fins. The tail is tapered and ends in a sharp point, with no visible vertical stabilizer. The landing gear consists of two simple, downward-pointing legs, and the cockpit area is not distinctly separated from the fuselage, suggesting a minimalistic or stylized design.
description: A sleek, stylized airplane with a white fuselage, green marbled wings and tail, and an orange rounded nose with metallic accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the orange rounded nose, metallic tip, and the symmetrical, swept-back green wings.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated white fuselage, green marbled tail, and the two downward-pointing landing legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the pointed green tail and the full span of the swept-back wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the white fuselage, green tail, and landing legs from the other side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines present on the fuselage or wings.
attribute_tail_design: Tapered tail with no visible vertical stabilizer, resembling a minimalist or unconventional tail design.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed landing gear with two simple, downward-pointing legs.
attribute_cockpit_placement: No distinct cockpit area visible; appears integrated into the forward fuselage with no visible canopy or windows.
